packageRules.description: Third-party images and the RabbitMQ subchart: automerge patches only. A minor bump of Postgres or Typesense is a real upgrade of a stateful component, so it gets a human.
First-party ister images. Each gets its own PR and its own version line — server, player and migrations do not move in lockstep.
GitHub Actions. Grouped, and chore(deps) rather than fix(deps) so a bumped action does not release a new chart — see .github/workflows/release.yml.
Majors are never automerged. They land on the dependency dashboard and wait for a human.
